3082100.name: Day of the Shell: Prologue
3082100.description:
Day of the Shell: Prologue is the free version of Day of the Shell. It is a fast-paced tactical roguelite, where each turn is played in a single click.

The gods have brought down their wrath on humanity, and only a few remote islands remain. A lonely monster huntress has risen to challenge and appease the gods, traveling through what's left of the world.

PROLOGUE FEATURES

  • 1 world, 13 islands to explore

  • 2 weapons: revolver and crossbow

  • 9 blessings and 12 relics to combine

  • 7 runes to permanently improve the Huntress’s passive skills

  • 5 unique enemies
3082100.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 韩语, 波兰语, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
